target_property: Firewall / cab-to-engine harness pass-through connector pinout, circuit designations, and CAN termination architecture
system_context: LV gateway for VCU splice / APPS / ignition / cluster without invented DTCs map
inference_forbidden_reason: Pinout and CAN termination cannot be inferred from geometry or marketing literature.

best_source_tiers.notes: Commercial handoff via MISN-000001/000003. Connector ID 'C127' is OPERATOR_CANDIDATE only until EWD bytes confirm designation.

honesty_notes: Do not invent C127 pin map. Operator connector ID retained as candidate label only.
Harness CFGCOMP is placeholder until EWD-backed initialization.
